Case: 22-10312, 12/22/2025, ID: 12944325, DktEntry: 109, Page 1 of 1

                   UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS
                                                                   FILED
                          FOR THE NINTH CIRCUIT
                                                                   DEC 22 2025
                                                                  MOLLY C. DWYER, CLERK
                                                                   U.S. COURT OF APPEALS




 UNITED STATES OF AMERICA,                    No. 22-10312

              Plaintiff - Appellee,
                                              D.C. No. 5:18-cr-00258-EJD-1
  v.                                          U.S. District Court for Northern
                                              California, San Jose
 ELIZABETH A. HOLMES,
                                              ORDER
              Defendant - Appellant.


       The mandate issued on May 16, 2025 is recalled to allow Court to issue

amended opinion.

                                              FOR THE COURT:

                                              MOLLY C. DWYER
                                              CLERK OF COURT

Case: 22-10312, 05/08/2025, ID: 12928743, DktEntry: 107, Page 1 of 1




                      UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS                    FILED
                           FOR THE NINTH CIRCUIT                         MAY 8 2025
                                                                     MOLLY C. DWYER, CLERK
                                                                      U.S. COURT OF APPEALS
UNITED STATES OF AMERICA,                      No.    22-10312

                Plaintiff-Appellee,            D.C. No.
                                               5:18-cr-00258-EJD-1
 v.                                            Northern District of California,
                                               San Jose
ELIZABETH A. HOLMES,
                                               ORDER
                Defendant-Appellant.

Before: SCHROEDER, NGUYEN, and R. NELSON, Circuit Judges.

      The panel has unanimously voted to deny Appellant’s petition for panel

rehearing, filed April 9, 2025. Judge Nguyen and Judge Nelson have voted to deny

the petition for rehearing en banc, and Judge Schroeder has so recommended.

      The full court has been advised of the petition for rehearing en banc, and no

judge of the court has requested a vote on whether to rehear the matter en banc.

Fed. R. App. P. 40.

      The petition for panel rehearing and rehearing en banc (Dkt. 106) is

DENIED.
